footer.description: ✨ Trusted Play Together account shop. Safe transactions, 24/7 support! 🎮

authPage.registerDesc: Create a new account to get started

verifyEmailPage.verifyEmailDesc: We have sent a 6-digit verification code to your email:

forgotPasswordPage.forgotPasswordStep1: Enter email to receive recovery code
forgotPasswordPage.forgotPasswordStep2: Enter the OTP code sent to
forgotPasswordPage.captchaError: Please verify that you are not a robot.

homePage.heroDescription: 🌟 Specialized in high-quality Play Together accounts!
homePage.featureHouseDesc: Many accounts own super cute decorated houses with luxury furniture
homePage.featureOutfitDesc: Accounts with hundreds of skins, limited edition outfits, and rare items
homePage.findByPriceDesc: Choose a price range that fits your budget! 🎯
homePage.priceDescSuperVip: Super VIP accounts with many rare items

guidePage.guideDesc: In just 4 simple steps, you can own your favorite Play Together account. Follow the instructions below for an easy purchase!
guidePage.step1Desc: Visit the Account List page, use the price and game filters to find the account you like.
guidePage.step2Desc: Click on an account to view detailed information, including images, descriptions, and attributes.
guidePage.step3Desc: Since the website is currently under development, please contact us via Zalo or Instagram for assistance with your purchase.
guidePage.step4Desc: After successful payment, you will receive the account login information.
step4Tips: Log in and check the account immediately
Contact support if there are any issues
guidePage.supportDesc: If you encounter any issues during the purchase process, don't hesitate to contact us via Zalo or Instagram. Our support team is always ready to help you 24/7!

warrantyPage.warrantyDesc: We are committed to providing a safe and reliable shopping experience. Every transaction is covered by a clear warranty policy.
warrantyPage.warranty24hDesc: All accounts are warranted for the first 24 hours after delivery. If there are login issues or the account does not match the description, we will refund or exchange it for a new one.
warrantyPage.freeExchangeDesc: During the warranty period, if the account encounters an issue (banned or missing items due to system errors), you will be exchanged for another account of equivalent value.
warrantyPage.fastSupportDesc: The support team responds within 30 minutes (business hours) and a maximum of 2 hours (after hours).
warrantyPage.covered1: Unable to log in due to incorrect information
warrantyPage.covered2: Account banned immediately after receipt (due to shop error)
warrantyPage.covered3: Account info does not match description (items, skins, level...)
warrantyPage.covered4: Account was previously sold to someone else
warrantyPage.notCovered1: Account banned due to buyer violating game policies
warrantyPage.notCovered2: Buyer shared account info with others
warrantyPage.notCovered3: Account hacked due to poor security by the buyer
warrantyPage.notCovered4: Warranty request after the specified time (24h)
warrantyPage.notCovered5: Buyer changed information and then forgot it
warrantyPage.processStep1Desc: Send a message via Instagram/Zalo with your order ID and a description of the issue
warrantyPage.processStep2Desc: The team will check and confirm the issue within 30 minutes
warrantyPage.processStep3Desc: Refund or exchange for a new account within 1-2 hours after confirmation
warrantyPage.notice1: After receiving the account, please change the password immediately for security.
warrantyPage.notice2: Do not share login information with anyone.
warrantyPage.notice3: Save your order ID for easy tracking and warranty.
warrantyPage.notice4: Check the account immediately after receiving it to ensure your warranty rights.
warrantyPage.requestWarrantyDesc: Contact us immediately via Instagram or Zalo with your order ID for the fastest support. Our team is always ready to resolve any of your issues!
